pages.title: Nelson Structural Default Demo
pages.instructions: This real public site is the default demo because it currently allows iframe embedding and gives reviewers a more realistic page to inspect.

pages.title: Controlled Dev vs Live Layout Demo
pages.instructions: These same-origin demo files embed reliably on GitHub Pages and stay available as a fallback if a third-party site changes its iframe policy.

seedNotes.comment: Default demo page: use Nelson Structural to show a real public website loading inside the reviewer.
Try the Full desktop and 1440 desktop tabs to show how the review viewport changes.
Controlled fallback page: useful when you want a guaranteed same-origin embed during a walkthrough.
